name: FTAI Aviation Ltd.
summary: PART I Our Company FTAI Aviation Ltd. (Nasdaq: FTAI) is a Cayman Islands exempted company. Except as otherwise specified, we, us, our, FTAI, FTAI Aviation or the Company refer to us and our consolidated subsidiaries. We are a leading independent engine maintenance platform focused on the CFM56-5B, CFM56-7B and V2500 aircraft engines which power the 737NG and A320ceo aircraft.
